use_cases: Displaying shareholder reports and quarterly financial results in a horizontally scrollable carousel
Presenting image-based corporate communications with navigation controls
Showcasing sequential content like annual reports or investor presentations
Creating interactive report galleries for financial or corporate websites
Building scrollable media galleries with arrow-based navigation
ai_summary: A horizontal scrolling carousel component designed for displaying shareholder reports and corporate communications. Features smooth scroll behavior with left/right navigation arrows that dynamically show/hide based on scroll position. Includes support for report metadata (quarter, period), optional new indicators, and custom title/subtitle text. Built with React forwardRef pattern and Tailwind CSS for flexible styling integration.
